candidate.completion: text me back badly; even typos count as chemistry.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please text me back badly; even typos count as chemistry.

evaluation.rationale: The line makes a clean, relatable turn from loneliness to treating flawed attention as romantic signal, and “typos count as chemistry” carries the joke. The pivot is smart and compact, though the reversal is more wry than incisive and the phrasing is not fully irreplaceable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
